lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਕਸਾਈਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਖੰਨੑਿ ॥
lines.translit: akhee prem kasaaeea har har naam pikhana |
lines.english: The eyes which are attracted by the Lord's Love behold the Lord through the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕਰਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਦੇਖਦੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਢਿ ਦਿਚੰਨੑਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: je kar doojaa dekhade jan naanak kadt dichana |2|
lines.english: If they gaze upon something else, O servant Nanak, they ought to be gouged out. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਦਾ ਜੋ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant pratipaaladaa jo kare su hoee |
lines.english: He cherishes and sustains all beings and creatures; whatever He does comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਨੋ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal poorano aparanpar soee |
lines.english: The Infinite Lord totally permeates the water, the land and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਮੀਤ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa sut bhraat meet tis bin nahee koee |
lines.english: Without Him, we have no mother, father, children, sibling or friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਪਿਅਹੁ ਜਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar rav rahiaa japiahu jan koee |
lines.english: He is permeating and pervading deep within each and every heart; let everyone meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸਿ ਸਜਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਇਆ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh mile si sajanaa har prabh paaeaa rang |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who meet as friends are blessed with the Lord God's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਜਪਹੁ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੁਨ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਸਭ ਲੋਈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: sagal japahu gopaal gun paragatt sabh loee |13|
lines.english: Let all chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the World, who is manifest all over the world. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਤੂ ਲੁਡਿ ਲੁਡਿ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਵੰਞੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam salaeh too ludd ludd darageh vany |1|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, praise the Naam, the Name of the Lord; you shall go to His court in joyous high spirits. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਾਤੈ ਦਾਤਾਰਿ ਹਥੁ ਕਢਿਆ ਮੀਹੁ ਵੁਠਾ ਸੈਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har daatai daataar hath kadtiaa meehu vutthaa saisaare |
lines.english: The Generous Lord, the Great Giver reaches out with His Hands, and the rain pours down on the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੂਹੈ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭਸ ਦਾ ਸਭਿ ਜੀਅ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har toohai daataa sabhas daa sabh jeea tumaare |
lines.english: Lord, You are the Great Giver of all; all beings are Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਤੁਧੈ ਨੋ ਆਰਾਧਦੇ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tudhai no aaraadhade daan dehi piaare |
lines.english: They all worship You in adoration; You bless them with Your Bounty, O Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਨੁ ਜੰਮਿਆ ਖੇਤੀ ਭਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮੑਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: an jamiaa khetee bhaau kar har naam samaare |
lines.english: The corn germinates in the fields; contemplate the Lord's Name with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak mangai daan prabh har naam adhaare |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak begs for the Gift of the Support of the Name of his Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਛਾ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਪੂਰੀਐ ਜਪੀਐ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eichhaa man kee pooreeai japeeai sukh saagar |
lines.english: The desires of the mind are satisfied, meditating on the Ocean of Peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਅਰਾਧੀਅਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤਨਾਗਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ke charan araadheeeh gur sabad ratanaagar |
lines.english: Worship and adore the Feet of the Lord, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the jewel mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਜੀਤੀਐ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੈਰਾਗਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath jeeteeai jap har bairaagar |
lines.english: The treasure of this human life is won, meditating on the Lord of Detachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਾਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਫਾਟੈ ਜਮ ਕਾਗਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mil saadhoo sang udhaar hoe faattai jam kaagar |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one is saved, and the Decree of Death is torn up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਪਵਹੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੀ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਦੁਖ ਦਾਗਰੁ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: sabh pavahu saran satiguroo kee binasai dukh daagar |14|
lines.english: Let everyone seek the Sanctuary of the True Guru; let the black spot of pain, the scar of suffering, be erased. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਿਖਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak alakh na lakheeai guramukh dehi dikhaal |1|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, the Unseen is not seen, but the Gurmukh is given to see Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਢੂੰਢੇਂਦੀ ਸਜਣਾ ਸਜਣੁ ਮੈਡੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau dtoondtendee sajanaa sajan maiddai naal |
lines.english: I was seeking, searching for my Friend, but my Friend is right here with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਾਈ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਚੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak preet laaee tin sachai tis bin rehan na jaaee |
lines.english: O Nanak, I am in love with the True Lord; I cannot survive without Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta pooraa paaeeai har ras rasan rasaaee |2|
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, the Perfect Lord is found, and the tongue savors His Sublime Essence. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਸੁਣੈ ਕੋ ਉਚਰਿ ਸੁਨਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: koee gaavai ko sunai ko uchar sunaavai |
lines.english: Some sing, some listen, and some speek and preach.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਮਲੁ ਉਤਰੈ ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam kee mal utarai man chindiaa paavai |
lines.english: The filth and pollution of countless lifetimes is washed away, and the wishes of the mind are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਾ ਮੇਟੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa metteeai har ke gun gaavai |
lines.english: Coming and going in reincarnation ceases, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰਹਿ ਸੰਗੀ ਤਰਾਹਿ ਸਭ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਤਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap tareh sangee taraeh sabh kuttanb taraavai |
lines.english: They save themselves, and save their companions; they save all their generations as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜੋ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ॥੧੫॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tis balihaaranai jo mere har prabh bhaavai |15|1| sudh |
lines.english: Servant Nanak is a sacrifice to those who are pleasing to my Lord God. ||15||1|| Sudh||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਕਾਨੜਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਵ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag kaanarraa baanee naamadev jeeo kee |
lines.english: Raag Kaanraa, The Word Of Naam Dayv Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੈ ਘਟਾ ਘਟ ਲੀਪ ਨ ਛੀਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: basai ghattaa ghatt leep na chheepai |
lines.english: He dwells in each and every heart; no stain or stigma sticks to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: aiso raam raae antarajaamee |
lines.english: Such is the Sovereign Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of Hearts;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਦਰਪਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਬਦਨ ਪਰਵਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaise darapan maeh badan paravaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He sees everything as clearly as one's face reflected in a mirror. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਜਾਤੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bandhan mukataa jaat na deesai |1|
lines.english: He is liberated from bondage; He does not belong to any social class. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਕੋ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬੀਠਲੁ ਐਸਾ ॥੨॥੧॥
lines.translit: naame ko suaamee beetthal aisaa |2|1|
lines.english: so does Naam Dayv's Beloved Lord and Master appear. ||2||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਨੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਦੇਖੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਜੈਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: paanee maeh dekh mukh jaisaa |
lines.english: As one's face is reflected in the water,
